selections.name: Win Klingel
selections.reason: Strong 2nd last start at this track and distance. Ready to break through.

selections.name: Blue Amber
selections.reason: Set the pace and held on for 2nd last time out. Major threat on the front end.

selections.name: K's Charlotte
selections.reason: Racing first-up but has shown ability in the past. Good draw.

selections.name: Meiner La Gemme
selections.reason: Solid 3rd last start, improving type who can factor in the exotics.

danger_horse.name: Bruno The Beach
danger_horse.reason: Placed 2nd two starts back, capable of bouncing back.

selections.name: Festive Nisa
selections.reason: Consistent form with multiple placings recently. Inside draw is a big plus.

selections.name: Masano Lily
selections.reason: Led and finished 2nd last start. Will be prominent early.

selections.name: Chocolate Cake
selections.reason: Won two back and can rebound from a poor showing last time.

selections.name: Proud Bluebell
selections.reason: Broke through for a win last start and could go on with it.

danger_horse.name: Vip Regulus
danger_horse.reason: Won three starts back, capable if he finds his best form.

selections.name: Meiner Mont Blanc
selections.reason: Dominant 6-length winner last start. Looks very hard to beat from an inside gate.

selections.name: Noble Sniper
selections.reason: Strong 2nd last time and won prior. Main danger despite the wide draw.

selections.name: Departure
selections.reason: Won nicely last start and can continue to progress.

selections.name: Mori Invictus
selections.reason: Consistent placegetter who should be in the mix again.

danger_horse.name: Sammaru Force
danger_horse.reason: Won two starts back and placed 3rd recently. Genuine contender.

selections.name: Ume Mirai
selections.reason: Scored a big 4-length win last start. Should be right in the finish again.

selections.name: Cocoincidence
selections.reason: Finished 2nd behind the top pick last time. Will be charging home late.

selections.name: Quiet Enif
selections.reason: Solid 3rd last start and draws the rail. Worth following up.

selections.name: Teruken Renda
selections.reason: Finished 4th on debut and expected to be more prominent with experience.

danger_horse.name: Zendan My Way
danger_horse.reason: Consistent type who can sneak into the placings.

selections.name: Vivien One
selections.reason: Racing well recently with a solid 2nd last start. Has the credentials to play a major role.

selections.name: Methusalem
selections.reason: Third-up today and placed 3rd two starts back. Top prospect.

selections.name: Bella Flor
selections.reason: Finished 5th last start but expected to finish much closer in this field.

selections.name: Champagne Gold
selections.reason: Third-up and placed previously. Racing well and is a top prospect.

danger_horse.name: Cool Marlowe
danger_horse.reason: Consistent 4ths and 5ths recently. Drawn well and is among the chances.

selections.name: Nihonpiro Grit
selections.reason: Consistent form with recent placings. Working up to a win and worth following.

selections.name: Mizuiro
selections.reason: Resuming after a spell but won last campaign. Sure to be ready to run well.

selections.name: Horizon Blue
selections.reason: Form hard to fault with a 2nd and 3rd recently. Can take this out with slight improvement.

selections.name: Utakata
selections.reason: Finished 3rd last start and is worth following up from the inside gate.

danger_horse.name: Big Piquante
danger_horse.reason: Recent form sound with a 4th and 3rd. Well drawn and looks a genuine hope.

selections.name: Scheat
selections.reason: Second run back. Sat on the pace for 3rd last start and won previously. Among the top chances.

selections.name: M's Orfe
selections.reason: Form hard to fault with back-to-back 2nd place finishes. Chances enhanced by a nice marble.

selections.name: Fuku Yilan
selections.reason: Ready to win after a solid performance last time out.

selections.name: Win For You
selections.reason: Form hard to fault. Most recently 3rd and working up to a win.

danger_horse.name: Angela Love
danger_horse.reason: Held ground to the line for 2nd last start. Should go well.

selections.name: Silk Needle
selections.reason: Won last two starts as favourite. Fitter and should appreciate the step up in distance.

selections.name: At The Hop
selections.reason: On a three-run winning streak. Definite chance to continue the run.

selections.name: Idol Eyes
selections.reason: Second-up and has won previously when second-up. Strong winning chance.

selections.name: Thomas Tesoro
selections.reason: Racing well recently and ran on strongly last start. Definite winning chance.

danger_horse.name: Globe Fame
danger_horse.reason: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. Should be near her top.

selections.name: Star Wood Tail
selections.reason: Resuming favourite who won last 5 starts. Rates highly and has a big chance.

selections.name: Seiun Ater
selections.reason: Racing well recently with multiple 2nd place finishes. Leading chance again.

selections.name: Lord Relation
selections.reason: Sure to be tough to beat from an inside draw based on prior form.

selections.name: A Shin Go On
selections.reason: Placed 3rd recently and can factor if he finds his best.

danger_horse.name: Your Glory
danger_horse.reason: Making headway and likely to measure up again.

selections.name: Long Tone
selections.reason: Form hard to fault. Tracked the speed and won by 3 lengths last start. Big chance to go back-to-back.

selections.name: Cal Bay Cruise
selections.reason: Form hard to fault. Closing in on a win after a solid 3rd last start.

selections.name: Brighten
selections.reason: Capable of more and worth another chance based on prior 2nd place finishes.

selections.name: Namura Olivia
selections.reason: Form hard to fault. Won last start and ideally placed to make it two on the trot.

danger_horse.name: Orion Heart
danger_horse.reason: Returning from a spell but has won previously when first up. Likely to run well.

selections.name: Eiger
selections.reason: Racing well recently. Won last start as favourite and has a big chance to make it back-to-back successes.

selections.name: Marutoku Laurel
selections.reason: Recent form sound. Poised to win after a narrow defeat last time.

selections.name: Otembamusume
selections.reason: Chasing a hat-trick. Won last start and is well placed to prove hard to beat.

selections.name: Comune
selections.reason: Better than last start suggests; she can bounce back based on prior win.

danger_horse.name: Raging Thrust
danger_horse.reason: Won last start and racing well. Can win again.

selections.name: Lady Majesty
selections.reason: Weak field and she is the favourite. Worth another chance despite recent form.

selections.name: Up Monster
selections.reason: Draws a nice alley and rates highly in this weak lineup.

selections.name: Fukuchan Fukumei
selections.reason: Can easily finish right over the top of these.

selections.name: Yama Circle
selections.reason: Fully tested on her recent run but could factor in a weak race.

danger_horse.name: Paris Mode
danger_horse.reason: Cannot be ruled out despite a moderate effort last time.
